title: colocasia obtusiloba
intro: Colocasia obtusiloba, also known as elephant ear, is a type of plant belonging to the Arum family, characterized by its large, flat leaves with a wavy or lobed edge. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Colocasia obtusiloba include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating various skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, poultice, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health issues.
